/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/CounterApp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/CounterApp.dir/CounterApp_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CounterApp.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CounterApp.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CounterApp.dir/counter.cpp.o -o CounterApp  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
